case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. RONALD RHODES et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-11-2003 - SETTLED AT SETT CONF.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR RELEASE FROM STAY & JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE RESTITUTION OF PREMISES, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-07-2003 - CASE SETTLED BY WRITTEN AGREEMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. RICHARD HURLBURT, PRO TEM JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK; NOT REPORTED. SEE FILED STIPULATION SIGNED BY THE PARTIES. OFF TRIAL CALENDAR DEPT. 206 ON 8/11/03.

ORDER "COURT ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX-PARTE APPLICATION FOR RELIEF FROM STAY AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT"

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RHODES, RONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 44 MCALLISTER STREET, #314, SF $500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, SEE SCANNED "UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT"
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $10.56 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
